meaning: n.经纪业,掮客业adj.做经纪的
examples: But Mr Geronzi can draw on decades of power-broking in Rome.
It is easy to buy and sell shares worldwide now thanks to Internet stock broking.
Besides, if ever there was a time when pay in banking and broking is likely to be depressed by the market, it is now.
The banking watchdog is now planning to introduce an inter-dealer broking system for trading bonds.
Young people are getting into business in a big way - mostly in commodity broking.
